title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates:
Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates!
